title: Zoom out table views by 10%
excerpt: When I zoom out 10% to 90% instead of 100, tables look way better. Once I go back to 100%, it feels like it’s zoomed in and not natural. 100% is just too zoomed in. 95% is better too. Just my opinion. When you’re zoomed …

posts.author: Lucas2 (Lucas Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: When I zoom out 10% to 90% instead of 100, tables look way better. Once I go back to 100%, it feels like it’s zoomed in and not natural. 100% is just too zoomed in. 95% is better too. Just my opinion. When you’re zoomed in you can see like 4 columns and 10 rows, which I don’t like
